pericopes.title: Jinei dingnu le jinei dingpa kitoh a akipa khom lhon
Kidei jong hi thina banga Thanei tah ahi

chapters.text: La lah a la kilhengdoh Solomon la chu.
@@@1O kaden, aman mi abengchopna ji @3akamsunga chu @2Keima beng achop hitave leh! @1Nangin neilungset chu @2Ju-ning sangin jong alhumjoi.
@@@1Nangman nakinuji thaotwi jong anam @3tui lheh-in, @2Namin jeng jong thaotwi kisung lha abange; @1Hichejeh tah jong chun @2Nu-ngah jousen nangbou nadei tauve.

@@@1Nanung nunga neikaiyin lang @2Kijam mangloi ta hite. @1Lengpan aindan sunga eipuilut’in, @2Nachunga keiho kakipa thanop diu, @1Nangin neilungset nau hi ju-ning @3sanga kalhumsah-uva, @2Kichentah le dih tah a amahon nadeichat @3diu ahi.
@@@1Vo Jerusalem chanute, @2Keima kavom nan kamel hoitah ahibouve, @1Kedar phaiya ponbuh kisong ho tobang @2Solomon pondal dia kikhaiho tobang kahi.

@@@1Kavouso avomjep jeh le nisan eikah @3dup jeh-in @2Neive mai mai hih-in; @1Kasopi pasal kanu chapate kachunga @3alung hanguvin, @2Hijeh chun lengpilei hon ngah-in @3eipansah tauve; @1Hijeh hin keiman kalengpilei joh @2Ki-nga thei louvin kaumlo tai!

@@@1Kalunga kadei chat jing nangin @3neiseipeh temin, @2Nakelngoi hon hoilama navah ding @3hiya, @1Sun tengleh hoilama nagakolsah ding @3ham? @2Ajeh chu ipi dinga keima hi vahvei @3banga kauma @2Nakelngoi honte kom dunga @1Naloi nagol ho koma kaum le ding ham?
@@@1Vo numei lah a mel-hoipen nu, @2Nangin nahet louva ahileh @1Kelngoihon te kikaina nung juiyin, @2Kelngoi ching ho ponbuh vel’a chun @3nakelngoinou vah-in.
@@@1Kadeinu, ken nang hi Pharaoh kangtalai @3kaiya pang @2Sakol lagol hoitah khattoh katekah @3jinge.
@@@1Nakhalhang teni jong nakijepna @3chengsen ahoisah lheh-in, @2Na-ngong chang jong sanajem pah hon @3ahoisah chome.
@@@1Keihon nakijepna ding sana nasempeh @3uving ting, @2Dangka vui ka-o peh dingu nahi.
@@@1Lengpa chu ajalkhuna alup pet’in, @2Kathao namtui chu ahung namcheng @3chung jenge.
@@@1Kadeipa chu kei din myrrh namtui @3sakhao dimset tobang ahin, @2Kanoi teni kah a kikhai jing sakhao @3bangin aume.
@@@1Kadeinu chu kei din henna khao @3pahcha pah le @2Enge’di lengpileiya pahcha boh tobang @3ahi.
@@@1Kivetemin kadeinu, nangma nahoi @3lheh jenge, @2Kiven kiven nahoi lheh jengin ahi; @1Namit chang teni jong chu @2Vakhu te nupa abang jenge.
@@@1Kadeipa nang jong kivetemin nahoi @3lheh jengin, @2Dihtah mongin dei dei naum jengin ahi. @1I-lupna lhon ding jalkhun jong hi @2A-engsil sel jengin ahi.
@@@1I-inkam jouse lhon jong cedar thing @3jeng ahin, @2I-insun chengse lhon jong chahthing ahi.
@@@1Kei hi Sharon pah le @2Phaicham dunga lily pah chu kahi.
@@@1Lingle khao lah a lily pah bangin, @2Kadeinu chu nu-ngah ho lah a aume.
@@@1Gammang thing lah a theithup phung @3bangin, @2Kadeipa chu gollhang ho lah a aume. @1Kipah thanomin keijong kadeipa lima katouvin. @2Atohga chu katep leh alhum keiye.
@@@1Kadeipan golvah kibolna in’a eipuilut’in, @2Eilungsetna chu kachunga ponlap bangin @3akikhange.
@@@1Lengpitheigan neivah-in lang, @2Theithup chang hon neivah-in tha @3thah neipen; @1Ajeh chu kadei behseh jeh-in @2Keiman kanatlo hel tai.
@@@1O kadeh, kadeipa khut veilam @3kihap’ing lang, @2A man jong akhut jetlamin eikoi leh!

@@@1Vo Jerusalem chanute nang ho thu @3kapeh nahiuve, @2Chule loujaova sapeng le sakhipi ho @3banga kahil nahiuve; @1Kidei kiti hi ama acham @3chama ahung kipat ngal louleh @2Nang hon tildoh tho ding le suhkhah @3tho din got dauvin.
@@@1Kadeipa ogin akijatai! Ven ven, @3ahung jenge; @2Molsang dunga ahung kichom chomin, @1Thinglhang vum dunga akichomle lei.

@@@1Kadeipa chu sapeng gol tobang ahin, @2Sakhi chalgol tobang jong ahi; @1Ven, hikoma khun ading jinge, @2Kabang tom’uva adinge; @1Bangkot vangkah dunga ahinve lhi @3le len, @2Bang vangkah dunga ahinvei.
@@@1Kadeipan kajah a thu aseiyin @3hitin ati, @2“Kadeinu mel-hoi tah hung thouvin, @1Hiti hin kijot mang ta hite; @2Ajeh chu vetan phalbi akichaitan.
@1Kho aphan, @2Gotwi jong akangin ajutapoi.
@@@1Leiset chunga pahcha ahung pah tan, @2Nop lasah phat ahung lhunge; @1Igamsung uva jong @2Vahui hamgin akijai.

@@@1Theichang phung jong a hung @3ga pan tan, @2Lengpithei phung jong apah pantai; @1Thing ho hin apah semdoh-in anam @3nguisoh tauve. @2Kadei mel-hoi nu hung kipatdoh loiyin. @1Hungin kilhai mang loi ta hite.

@@@1Vo songpi khi kah dunga kadei @3vakhu nou, @2Songpi kohom khi kah dunga thip beh @3cha cheng nu; @2Namai nei musah-in lang, @1Na-ogin neijah tei teiyin; @2Ajeh chu nangma ogin hi angei @3lheh jengin, @1Namai jong mel-hoi tah vetnom @3um ahi.
@@@1Lengpilei lai dung chil thanga @3pangji @2Se-alte leh se-al noute khu neimat @3peh-uvin; @1Ajeh chu keiho lengpilei hi @2Lengpithei pah lai ahitai.” ati.
@@@1Kadeipa chu keiya ahin, @2Keijong a ma a kahi; @1Kadeipan akelngoi hon chu @2Lily pah lah a avah jin alhajie.
@@@1Jingkah khohui theng ahung nun @3masang, @2Nisa lim jong akihei mang masangin, @1Hung kiheiyin kadei, molsang kikhap @2chet chut chung dunga @1Sapeng gol le sakhi chalgol bangin @2hung lhan.
@@@1Janin kajalkhun chunga @2Kalungthima kadeipa chu kahol holjie; @1Kadeipa kahol hol vangin kamudoh joupon. @2Kakouva ahijongleh aman eihoupoi.

@@@1“Keima kipatdoh-ing ting khopi sung @3dunga @2Gavah leng ting kholai veng ningkoi @3dung @2Gachon lenge, kalungthima kadeipa chu @3Gahol leng kate,” kati. @1Hijeh chun kadeipa chu kahol le len, @2Ahivanginla kamudoh jou deh poi.
@@@1Kho-ngah hon khopi sung dunga ava @3le nauva eimu’uvin, @2Kenjong, “Kalunga kadeipa chu namu @3khah um?” kati.

@@@1Amaho chu kadalha panbep nalaiyin @2Kalungthima kadeipa chu kamudoh @3paitai. @1Chuin kadeipa chu katuh chah den @3jengin @2Kachedoh sah tapoi; @1Kanu insunga kahin puilut kahsen @2Lhaso louhel’in katuh det jengin, @1Keima a-oisunga einavop kanu insung @3kalhut masangin @2Aindan sunga kapuilut kahsen @3kalhakang tapoi.

@@@1Vo Jerusalem chanute nang ho thu @3kapeh nahiuve, @2Chule loujaova sapeng le sakhipi ho @3banga kahil nahiuve; @1Kidei kiti hi ama cham chama ahung @3kipat ngal louleh, @2Nang hon tildoh tho ding le suhkhah @3tho din got dauvin.
@@@1Gammang lama meikhu lom banga @2Hung kijeldoh let lut pikhu ipi @3hiya, @1Myrrh namtui le bego kilhutnam @3bang jenga, @2Kivei mite thil gimnamtui jouse @3kihal-khom bang jeng ham?
@@@1Vetan, hiche khu Solomon tollai @3ahi! @2Tollai kimvela khun Israel mite @3mihat cheh @1Pasal thahat lai lai @2Mihem somgup jen ahung panguve.
@@@1Mihat ho khun chemjam akiko soh @3keiyun, @2Gal sat themsa cheh ahiuve; @1Pasal jouse khun akhel’uva chemjam @3akiko soh keiyun, @2Jan tengleh husa ngai lhi geh-in @3aum’ui.
@@@1Solomon lengpan ama kiputna din @2Lebanon lhanga thing chun tollai @3khat akiseme.
@@@1Tollai khom chengse chu dangka @3jengin asemin, @2Anung lam chu sanan atomin, @1Atouna mun chu ponsandup’in akiseme; @2Asung lam jong chu Jerusalem chanuten @3hoitah a asemdoh-u ahitai.
@@@1Potdoh loiyun gaveuvin, @2Vo Zion chanute Solomon lengpa khu! @1Anun lallukhuh akhuhpeh chu akikhuhin, @2Ajinei nikhoa dingin, alungthim kipa @3nikhoa din.

@@@1Kadeinu, kive temin nangma nahoi @3lheh jenge, @2Kiven kiven, nangma nahoi lheh @3jenge! @1Naponlu khuh sunga chun @2Namit chang teni jong vakhu tobang @3ahilhone. @1Nasamjong kelcha honlah abang @3jengin, @2Gilead molpanga lhaisuh tobang @3ahiuve.
@@@1Nahatu jouse jong kelngoipi amul kivousa @3tobang, @2Akisop thengsel nunga hung kipodoh @3tobang ahi; @1Kelngoipi chujat lah a anou soh kop hiya @2Khatcha jong akeova umlou tobang ahi.
@@@1Nanegei teni jong patsan tobang ahin, @2Nakamsung jong ahoi lheh jenge. @1Naponlu khuh sunga nabengphe te nijong @3chu @2Kolbuthei chang kikehso tobang @3ahilhone.

@@@1Na-ngong chang jong David insang tobang @3ahin, @2Galsat manchah jouse koina kisadoh @3chutoh abange; @1Hiche insang chunga chu lum sang khat @3jen kikhai ahin, @2Aboncha chu gal-hang ho lum jeng jeng @3ahibouve.
@@@1Nanoi teni jong apengkop, @2Lily pah lah a lha le sapeng nou pengkop @3teni tobang ahi.
@@@1Jingkah huitheng ahung nun masang, @2Nisa lim kihei masanga, @1Keiman Myrrh molsang kajot’a @2Bego lhang kajot tou ding ahitai.
@@@1Kadeinu nang vang nahoisoh keiye, @2Natichung abolkom le demna ding naumpoi.

@@@1Kaji dingnu Lebanon lhanga konin @3kilhon hite hungin, @2Hungin Lebanon lhanga konin kilhonin @3chete; @1Ama’na lhangvum, @2Senir mollubuh le Hermon vuma kon, @1Sakei bahkaiho kokhuh dunga kon leh @2Kei-ahisite chenna lhanga konin @3Potdoh loi jengin.
@@@1Kanao, kaji dingnu, @2Nangin kalungthim neilah mangpeh @3ahitai, @1Nangin neimitsih at’a @2Nakhivui sanapah jem kamuleh @3kalungthim alamange.
@@@1Kanao kaji dingnu, neilungset hi iti @3nop hitam! @2Nangin neilungset hi ju-ning sanga @3jong ichan geiya lhumjo hi tam! @1Nakinu thao namtui jong hi @2Thil mantui jouse sangin anamtuijoi.
@@@1Kaji dingnu, nakamsunga khoiju ahung @3long lhan, @2Naleigui noiya jong khoiju le bongnoi @3kikhol abange; @1Naponsil ho jong agimnamtui dan @2Lebanon lhang gimnamtui bep ahi.
@@@1Kanao kaji dingnu hi honlei kot-heh @3kikamkhum tobang ahin, @2Honlei kot-heh kikamkhum, twinah mohor @3kinamden tobang ahitai.
@@@1Nadong lha jong kolbuthei pah le @2Thingga hoipen, Henna khoa pah namtui @3pen tobang ahi.
@@@1Gimnamtui le sehlhum, kolju le @3thingthai, @2Bego thing jouse le Myrrh toh aloes @3namtui toh, gimnamtui atuipen tah,
@@@1Twinah phunga honlei kibol, @2Hinna twi putna twikul jong, @1Kang louhel’a hung long @2Lebanon lhanga vadung tobang nahi.

@@@1Vo sahlam khohui hung kipat loiyin, @2Vo lhanglam khohui hung nung loiyin! @1Kahon sung hi hinsem hoh loiyin, @2Agimnamtui hin gamle lei thongsoh @3hen. @1Chuteng kadeipa chu ahonleiya hung @3hen lang @2Honsunga theiga hoipen hung nehen.

@@@1Keima kahonleiya kahung tai, @2Kaji dingnu kanao; @1Keima gimnamtui chutoh Myrrh namtui tah @3jong chu kalou khome; @1Kakhoibal jong chu @2Kakhoiju chutoh kamen kanetai. @1Kalengpitwi jong kadonin, @2Kabongnoi toh kametai. @1Vo golte, neuvin lang don’uvin, @2Vo akideiho, nachim nanangin don’uvin!

@@@1Keima kalum nan kalungthimla aihmu poi. @2Hei, kadeipan kot akiu kiuve. @1“Kot neihonin, kanao kadeinu, @2Kadei chamkim nu kavakhu nou; @1Ajeh chu kalujang jouse daitwi achen, @2Kasamhol dung jong janlai daitwi lhan @3akotsoh-e,” ati.
@@@1Ken kavon kisut lhasoh ta @2Iti kakivon kit ding hitam? @1Kakeng phangte ni kisil ngimsoh ta @2Iti kachot thang kit thei ding ham?
@@@1Kadeipan kotvang kah ahinkhoiyin @3ahileh @2Hichun keijong kalungsung akithing @3thing jenge.
@@@1Kadeipa kot honpeh din kathouvin, @2Kakhut teni jong Myrrh namtui kanu @3kot’in, @2Kakhut jung jouse Myrrh twi kadekot’in, @1Kotkil chung dunga jong kanu namsoh @3keiye.

@@@1Keiman kadeipa kot kahonin, @2Ahinla kadeipa chu akiheiyin achemang @3tai. @1Kadeipan kajah a thu aseipet chun @2Kalungthim amangpai ding ahitai. @1Kadeipa chu kahol hoi jengin @2Ahivangin kamudoh deh tapoi. @1Kakou kou jeng vangin @2Amanla eihou deh sam tapoi.
@@@1Kho-ngah ho chu khopi kimvela akijotle @3nauva @2Keima eitoh khauvin, eijep’un eimavo @3tauve; @1Palvum dunga pal ngah a pang hon @2Kaponsil akilah mang tauve.
@@@1Vo Jerusalem chanute, najah-uva @3kasei a hi, @2Kadeipa chu namu’uva ahileh, @1Ama ka-ngaina lamin @2Kanatlo tai, ati tin seipeh tei teiyun.

@@@1Vo numei lah a numei mel-hoi chung @3nungpen nu, @2Midangin adeipa sanga nangin nadeipa @3ija chung chon ham? @1Nangin nadeipa chu itobanga chung @3chonjo hiya @2Midang deipa sanga nangin keiho thu @3neipeh-u ham?
@@@1Ken kadeipa chu a ngouseh-in, @2Avouso jong atisan son ahi; @1Pasal sang som lah-a jong @2Kadeipa chu akithangpen tah ahi.
@@@1Alubuh jeng jong sana tum hoipen @3tah tobang ahin, @2Alujang sam jong akilchit chet’in, @1Ajangsam jouse chu @2Va-ah vom bangin avomsoh keiye.
@@@1Amitchang teni jong vakhu teni @3tobang ahin, @2Twinah phung koma touva, @1Bongnoi twiya kisil thenga @2Kitoh chet’a kito tobang ahi.
@@@1Angeiphe teni jong gimnamtui adimset @3jengin, @2Anamtui tui jeng asosah sah jenge; @1Akamsung jeng jong lily pah tobang @3ahin, @2Myrrh namtui twi avat lhahsah sah @3jenge.
@@@1Abanjang te jong sana tum kimeh @3jol tobang ahin, @2Sana pah jem kijempol tobang ahi; @1Atahsa atichung jong saiha kisui @3abangin, @2Sapphire songa kitom jolsel abange.
@@@1Akeng teni jeng jong chu @2Sana khomto dunga ngunsong khom kitungdoh @3tobang ahi. @1Amaiso amelput jeng jong chu @2Lebanon lhanga cedar thing hoipen tah @3tobang ahi.
@@@1Athusei mong mong jong angei behseh @3jengin, @2A-ilam ilama aboncha kadeipa chu deichat @3chat um jeng ahi. @1Vo Jerusalem chanute, @2Hitobang hi kagolpa, kadeipa chu ahiye.
@@@1Vo numei lah a mel-hoipen nu, @2Nadeipa nalungsetpa chu hoilama che hiya. @1Nakilungsetpi pa chu hoilama che hitam, @2Hitobanga keihon ama kahol diu chu?
@@@1Kadeipa chu gimnamtui dimsetna @2Ahonlei langa achesuh tan, @1Honlei lai dunga chu kelngoi hon @3vah a @2Lily pahho kilo khom dingin agoi.
@@@1Kei hi kadeipa ding kahin, @2Kadeipa jong chu kei ding ahi; @1Kadeipan lily pah lah a khun @2Akelngoihon avah-in an aneh sah @3jie.
@@@1Kadeinu, nangma Tirzah hoiyin nahoiyin, @2Jerusalem mel-hoiyin nahoiye; @1Chujongleh ponlap tampi kidop’a kon @2Tijat kichat umtah sepaite toh @3nabang jenge.
@@@1Neivet dan kihei mang jengin. @2Ajeh chu namit tenia neivet chun umthim @3mon eilhai; @1Nasamjang jong kelcha hon kikaitoh @3chet abangin, @2Gilead lhang panga kijotsuh abanguve.
@@@1Nahatu jouse jong kelngoipi amul @3kivousa tobang, @2Akisop thengsel nunga hung kipodoh @3tobang ahi; @1Kelngoipi chujat lah a anou soh @3kop hiya, @2Khatcha jong akeova umlou tobang @3ahi.
@@@1Naponlu khuh sunga nabengphe teni @3jong @2Kolbuthei chang kikehso tobangin @3asanpeh jenge.
@@@1Lengnu somgup alhingin, @2Thaikem somget jen alhingin, @1Nu-ngah a nu-ngah la @2Sima simjou dol ahipoi.

@@@1Ahin keidia chamkimsoh kavakhu nou. @2Achangseh seh a bou umah ahin, @1Anun jong alungset behseh jeng @3ahin, @2Ahingnu anu dia phatmona beihel @3ahiye. @1Nu-ngah hon amudoh-uvin, @2Nun nom nu atiuvin ahi; @1Lengnu ho le thaikem hon jong @2Kadeinu hi apacha soh keiyui.
@@@1“Jingkah khovah vah banga hung vah @3the thu khu koi hiya, @2Lhathah hoiya hoi, nisa vah a vah, @1Ponlap tampi kidop’a kijot sepaite @3banga @2Tijat kichat um khu koi ham?” @3atiuve.
@@@1Keijong beleiya bepah vedin kachesuh in, @2Phaichama pahcha pahho ve dingin @3kachei; @1Lengpigui ho dondoh soh tam, @2Kolbuthei ho jong pahsoh tam, @3tia ave din kachei.
@@@1Keiman kahetdoh masangin keidia milen @3milalpa koma @2Kalungthimin akangtalai sunga @3eitousah tai.

@@@1Vo Shu’lam mi, hung kile kit’in, @3hung kile kit’in, @2Keihon kavet theina diuvin hung kile @3kittei teiyin! @1Ipi dinga Shu’lam nu-ngah nu chu navet @3khoh khoh ding ham? @2Mi alama golni jena kigol kah-a lam @3dinga kigo banga?

@@@1Vo lengnu tobang nu-ngah nu, @2Nakengchot teni sunga nakeng phang @3teni chu itivet’a vetnom @4um hitam! @1Nakhelphe kikhil leh luh teni @3jong chu @2Sana pah jem abang jengin, @1Pasal khut themtah khat’in @2Akhut tah a asuitoh le le abange.
@@@1Nalaimu jong chu lhengkam bempel @3tobang ahin, @2Ju akisun jongleh va-lha louhel @3tobang ahi; @1Na-oipoh jong chu suhlou chang @3kihuivum abangin, @2Lily pah jousen aumkimvel soh keiye.
@@@1Nanoi teni jong apengkop @2Sapeng nou teni tobang ahi.

@@@1Na ngong chang jong saiha @2Insang kisa tobang ahin, @1Namit chang teni jong chu @2Heshbon phai le Bath-rab’bim @3kelkot phunga @1Twikul kisem ho bangin adulkeove. @1Nanah-lhong jong chu Damascus kho @3kimuna @2Lebanon lhanga insang kisadoh @3tobang ahi.
@@@1Naluchang jong Carmel molsang bangin @3akidoh sangin, @2Nasamlom kikhai lha ho jong ponsandup @3kikhai lha tobang ahi. @1Nasamboh a chu lengpa geiya @2Soh kihen-oh banga aoh den ahitai.
@@@1Vo deichat chat um kadei nu-ngah nu, @2Itobanga hoi nahiya iti lung lhai @3lhai um nahim!
@@@1Nangma chahthing sanin nasangin, @2Nanoi teni jong chahthing pahmum @3abange.

@@@1Keiman ‘Chahthing phunga kaldoh @3ing ting, @2Apahmum ho khu katuh chah den @3ding ahi,’ kati. @1O kaden, nanoi teni chu lengpitheiga @3aboh tobang hihen, @2Nanah hai gimnam jong theithup @3gimnam tobang hihen;
@@@1Mi beng nachop teng jongleh @2Ju-ning tuitah kidon nal-heova vah @3lut bangin, @1Kamsung dung le Hani kah dunga @3vahlut soh kei hen.
@@@1Keima kadeipa ding kahin, @2Aman adeichat chu kei ding ahi.
@@@1Kagoldei hungin, loujao dunga @3kon hitin, @2Mi kho dunga hung geh den hite;

@@@1Jingkah matah-in lengpileiya che @3hitin, @2Lengpigui ho pah tam gave hite; @1Lengpigui pahmum chu @2Pah lhasoh hitam, @1Kolbuthei ho jong chu @2Apah lhasoh a hitauvam; @1Hikoma chun keiman kadeilona @2Kapeh ding lom chu napenge.
@@@1Joldei ai jong agimnam atuisel jin, @2I-kotpi phung dunguva jong thingga @3phatah tah aume; @2Thingga thah jong thingga @3lui jong, @2Vo kadeipa, aboncha nang dia @3kakhol ahiye.
@@@1O kaden, nang chu kei dingin @2Kanu pheichunga anoitwiya kivahdoh @3kasopi bep bep nahin. @1Inpo lama natoh kha jong leng @2Nabeng kachop peh ding, koiman @3nahsahmoa eiboldeh lou ding ahi.
@@@1Nangma kapui puiya kanu insung @3kalhut ding, @2Eihingnu kanu indan sunga kapuilut@3
@@@1O kadeh, kadeipa khut veilam @3kikhap’ing lang @2A man jong akhut jetlamin eikoi @3leh!
@@@1Vo Jerusalem chanute nang ho thu @3kapeh nahiuve, @2Kidei kiti hi ama cham chama ahung @3kipat ngal louleh, @1Nang hon tildoh tho ding le @2Suh khah tho din got dauvin.

@@@1Gammang lah a hung kondoh khu @3koi hiya, @2Adeipa chunga ki-ngainu khu koi @3ham? @2Theithup phung noiya chu @1Keiman kasuh khahsa nahitan; @2Hikoma chu nanun so-nat nathoh pia, @1Nahing nun hikoma chu naoso-nat @3nathohpi ahi.

@@@1Nalungthima jong mohor kinam bangin @3nei namin, @2Nabanjang a jong mohor kinam bangin @3nei namin; @1Ajeh chu kideijong hi @2Thina thanei bang a thanei tah ahi; @1Kithangset jong vang hi @2Lhankhuh sung banga melse veng @3vung ahibouve. @1Ahung kitajah tengleh @2Meisi kitahjal abang jengin, @3meikong al-leng lung abangjie.

@@@1Kidei kiti hi twi tampin jong alhautam @3thei lou ding, @2Twisoh jengin jong alhoh mang @3louhel ding ahi. @1Mihem khattouvin ainsunga anei @3agou abonchan @2Kidei khel hin tohdoh jongleh imachan @3kigelpon te.
@@@1Keihon sopi numei neocha khat @3kaneiyun, @2Ama hi anoi teni abohhih laiye; @1Min ahung kijol nikho teng @2Keihon kasopinu’u dia hi ipi @3kabolpeh diu hitam?
@@@1Ama hi pal ham khat hileh @2Achungvuma gal panmun dangka a jong @3kasem theiyu, @1Kotpi ham khat hiya hijongleh @2Thing mantam cedar thinga @3katom-jolsel theiyu ahi.
@@@1Keima pal tobang kahin, @2Ka-noi teni jong insang kisa intingvum @3abange; @1Hichun keijong kadeipa mitmun @2Lungmon mon umin kaumdoh tai.
@@@1Ba’al-ha’mon kiti laiya chun @2Solomon in lengpilei khat aneiye; @1Chuin lengpilei chu angah ho @3angasah tai; @2Angah jousen athingga man ding @3dangka shekel sang khat apeh @4cheh diu ahi.
@@@1Kalengpilei, keiya mong mong hi @2Kachangseh a kachan ding ahin; @1Theiga ngah a pang ho chu @2Ja ni bou chang diu ahiye.
@@@1Vo honlei laiya chengpa, @2Kaloi kagolten na-ogin a ngaiyuve, @3keijong neijah sah-in.
@@@1Hungloi loiyin a kadeipa, gimnamtui @2molsang dunga chun @1Sapeng ham, sakhigol ham bangin @3hung kichom chomin!
